title: todos CLI Configuration
description: Configuration for the todos CLI tool (todosConfig.json)

editor.description: Command used to open todo files. Falls back to $EDITOR if absent. Multi-word commands are split on whitespace before spawning.

paths.description: Search paths for todo files. Defaults to ["todos"] if absent or empty. Each path may be relative to the project root or absolute (to support todos tracked in different git repositories).

items.description: A directory containing todo markdown files.

display.description: Style rules for table output. Each key is a field name; its value maps field values to space-separated style tokens.

additionalProperties.description: Maps field values to style strings. Use an empty string as the key to style todos where the field is absent or empty.
Space-separated style tokens. Modifiers: bold dim italic underline. Colors: black red green yellow blue magenta cyan white gray grey.

views.description: Named views — reusable filtered and sorted todo slices, invoked with `todos view <name>`.

include.description: Todos must match ALL conditions to appear (conditions are ANDed).

exclude.description: Todos matching ANY condition are hidden (conditions are ORed).

sort.description: Multi-key sort order. Each entry is a field name optionally followed by 'asc' or 'desc' (default asc).

items.description: Field name optionally followed by sort direction

condition.description: A single field=value filter. The key is a field name and the value is the string to match against.
